[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000011 3
1 1000010 2
2 1111110 6
3 1111111 a
4 0011110 4
5 0111011 5
6 0010110 3
7 0101000 2

01 10 0010101 3
12 21 0000001 1
23 32 0111100 4
34 43 0000001 1
45 54 0110111 5
56 65 0110000 2
67 76 0101100 3
70 07 0000010 1

02 20 0010100 2
13 31 0111101 5
24 42 0111101 5
35 53 0110110 4
46 64 0000111 3
57 75 0011100 3
60 06 0101110 4
71 17 0010111 4

03 30 0101000 2 match 7
14 41 0111100 4
25 52 0001010 2
36 63 0000110 2
47 74 0101011 4
50 05 0011110 4 match 4
61 16 0111011 5 match 5
72 27 0010110 3 match 6

04 40 0101001 3
15 51 0001011 3
26 62 0111010 4
37 73 0101010 3
